channel.title: David's Daily Bread
channel.description: A news briefing on technology, markets, and science. Loved by God. Baked fresh each morning.

item.title: Morning edition – Sunday, July 12, 2026: China evacuates nearly two million people as powerful typhoon makes landfall
item.description: Lead story: China evacuates nearly two million people as powerful typhoon makes landfall. Plus the morning's top stories in technology, markets, and science.

item.title: Morning edition – Saturday, July 11, 2026: China lands an orbital rocket for the first time, catching it in a net at sea
item.description: Lead story: China lands an orbital rocket for the first time, catching it in a net at sea. Plus the morning's top stories in technology, markets, and science.

item.title: Morning edition – Friday, July 10, 2026: SK Hynix raises $26.5 billion in the largest US listing ever by a foreign company
item.description: Lead story: SK Hynix raises $26.5 billion in the largest US listing ever by a foreign company. Plus the morning's top stories in technology, markets, and science.

item.title: Evening edition – Thursday, July 9, 2026: Meta starts charging for AI as three frontier labs ship on a single day
item.description: Lead story: Meta starts charging for AI as three frontier labs ship on a single day. Plus the evening's top stories in technology, markets, and science.

item.title: Morning edition – Thursday, July 9, 2026: OpenAI throws GPT-5.6 open to everyone as the frontier reshuffles in a single week
item.description: Lead story: OpenAI throws GPT-5.6 open to everyone as the frontier reshuffles in a single week. Plus the morning's top stories in technology, markets, and science.

item.title: Evening edition – Wednesday, July 8, 2026: U.S. strikes Iran again and Wall Street buckles: Dow sheds 577 as oil nears $80
item.description: Lead story: U.S. strikes Iran again and Wall Street buckles: Dow sheds 577 as oil nears $80. Plus the evening's top stories in technology, markets, and science.

item.title: Morning edition – Wednesday, July 8, 2026: Oil surges 6% and stocks tumble as Trump declares Iran ceasefire 'over'
item.description: Lead story: Oil surges 6% and stocks tumble as Trump declares Iran ceasefire 'over'. Plus the morning's top stories in technology, markets, and science.

item.title: Evening edition – Tuesday, July 7, 2026: Chip rout deepens as DeepSeek's silicon push and Samsung jolt Wall Street
item.description: Lead story: Chip rout deepens as DeepSeek's silicon push and Samsung jolt Wall Street. Plus the evening's top stories in technology, markets, and science.

item.title: Morning edition – Tuesday, July 7, 2026: Chip stocks slide as Samsung's profit surge fails to satisfy
item.description: Lead story: Chip stocks slide as Samsung's profit surge fails to satisfy. Plus the morning's top stories in technology, markets, and science.
